    Tech Docs Streams

    A curated directory of technical documentation blogs, newsletters, and podcasts

    Latest posts · Download OPML · 47 resources

    Blogs Podcasts Newsletters

     AmanHimself.dev RSS

    Aman blogs about writing, blogging, and coding, including nitty-gritty insights into the hows and whyfors.

     BufferBuffer: (mis)adventures of a technical writer

    Personal blog chronicling the adventures and misadventures of a technical writer; posts blend practical insights with humor and hard-won lessons about the tech writing profession.

     Cherryleaf Blog RSS

    Blog from UK-based technical communication consultancy Cherryleaf covering a wide range of topics including content strategy, documentation tools, tech comm careers, and emerging trends like AI.

     Cherryleaf Podcast

    Podcast from UK-based technical communication consultancy Cherryleaf covering a wide range of topics including content strategy, tools, careers, and industry trends (often featuring interviews with tech comm experts).

     ClickHelp Technical Writing Blog RSS

    Blog maintained by ClickHelp (a SaaS platform for topic-based help) covering industry news, how-to articles, general best practices, and occasional product announcements relevant to technical writers.

     Code, Content, and Career Newsletter RSS

    A monthly newsletter by Brian Hogan, with “opinions and advice about software, technical content creation, and career development” for those who write about technology.

     CoffeeCup.tech Atom

    Blog of writer Florence Venisse, chronicling experiments and exploration of technology related to technical content.

     CyberText Newsletter RSS

    Long-running newsletter and blog from CyberText Consulting offering practical advice on documentation tools (e.g. Word, Flare), career development, and web communication for technical writers.

     Dachary Carey Atom

    Personal blog of Dachary Carey, a technical writer and software developer. Posts cover a range of topics including documentation audits, case studies of docs sites/architecture, AI in technical writing, and programming docs tools.

     Damilola Oladele Atom

    Software developer and technical writer sharing posts on documentation best practices, open source contributions, community building and mentoring in tech.

     Daniel D. Beck Atom

    Docs-as-code practitioner sharing tutorials and insights on documentation automation, static site generators, Git/GitHub workflows, and occasional career tips for technical writers.

     djw.fyi RSS

    Blog of Daryl White, a technical writer with a broad array of experience in the field,

     DocOps Lab Blog RSS

    The DocOps Lab’s own blog covering documentation operations, docs-as-code practices, tooling reviews, and content strategy insights for technical writing teams.

     Docs by Design RSS

    Bob Watson’s blog pondering technical writing, API documentation, and broader topics in designing and delivering documentation effectively.

     docs goblin

    Personal blog by a technical writer exploring “doc tooling, AI‑augmenting tech writers, information architecture, and other assorted topics” in modern documentation.

     edmar.sh

    Community-oriented site and monthly newsletter discussing technical content and documentation best practices, with a focus on knowledge sharing among tech writers.

     Everything Technical Writing RSS

    A one-stop blog for all things technical writing with tips, tricks, and techniques for thriving as a technical writer in software. Includes career guidance, expert interviews, and insights into open-source documentation.

     ffeathers RSS

    Sarah Maddox’s technical writing (and occasional fiction) blog offering practical insights on technical communication, documentation community events, and writing in the tech world (with a dash of whimsy).

     Heroic Technical Writing RSS

    Bart Leahy’s blog providing advice and insights on the business and personal aspects of technical communication, including career growth, professional development, and proposal writing.

     Hire This One RSS

    Attached to the demo/portfolio site of an aspiring tech writer named Sam, this blog features posts about breaking into the field and trying out new tech.

     I'd Rather Be Writing Atom

    Widely read blog by Tom Johnson, covering API documentation, reference guides, AI-assisted authoring, and trends in technical writing.

     I'd Rather Be Writing Podcast

    Video podcast from Tom Johnson and Fabrizio Ferri Benedetti, covering topics related to API documentation, AI in technical writing, and interviews with industry experts.

     Instruction Manuel RSS

    New blog from Manny Silva, technical writer, engineer, maintainer of the popular open-source docs testing tool Doc Detective, and author of the book Docs as Tests.

     James Tasse RSS

    Mostly covering the involvement of AI in technical writing, James takes a highly technical and analytical approach to tooling and content.

     Just Write Click RSS

    Anne Gentle’s blog (author of Docs Like Code) about treating docs like code. Covers continuous publishing, static site generators (Sphinx, Hugo, etc), open-source documentation collaboration, and innovative content strategy techniques for technical writing teams.

     Kevin R. Kuhl RSS

    Filled with commentary on other writings, this traditional blog is a welcome blast from the past style. Kevin looks at all kinds of technology, old and new, from the perspective of a professional tech writer.

     Knowledgebase Ninjas Podcast

    Weekly interview podcast by Document360. Host Gowri Ramkumar chats with documentation experts about building better knowledge bases, the challenges of SaaS documentation, the role of AI in tech writing, and practical insights for technical communicators.

     KnowledgeOwl — The Owlery

    Blog from KnowledgeOwl (a knowledge base and documentation platform) covering knowledge base management, information architecture, search optimization, and content governance in documentation teams.

     Kyle Blank Rollins

    Personal blog featuring articles on professional growth (from academia to industry) and occasional technical-writing topics, as the author navigates career development and research.

     Leading Technical Communication RSS

    Larry Kunz’s blog featuring thought-provoking articles and advice on leadership and management within the technical communication field.

     leu escrivi! RSS

    Blog of France-based documentation engineer Ariel Kaiser, covering technical writing, docs tooling, and the impact and uses of AI.

     Little Language Models (Little Helper)

    Blog from the Vienna-based information-architecture consultancy Little Helper; posts explore information architecture, content modeling, and building frustration-free content experiences via structured content design.

     Liz Argall RSS

    The blog of an international community-building tech writer and mentor/coach. Posts ponder aspects of the craft like communication and collaboration.

     Paligo Blog RSS

    Company blog of the Paligo CCMS, providing technical communication professionals with expert guidance on creating efficient, scalable documentation systems. Topics include structured content (CCMS) workflows, information architecture, knowledge management, AI-ready documentation, and strategies to improve content quality.

     Passo Uno Atom

    Personal site of Fabrizio Ferri Benedetti (UX/technical writer) featuring editorial pieces and in-depth discussions about the current state of technical writing, documentation “experiments”, and the impact of AI on our industry.

     Read the Docs (Company Blog) Atom

    Blog from Read the Docs (a popular documentation hosting platform) covering platform updates, open source doc projects, static site generator news, and community announcements in the docs-as-code ecosystem.

     Robert Delwood RSS

    The Medium "stories" of a professional API documentation writer, programmer, and former NASA engineer.

     Sarah Deaton RSS

    Sarah’s deep and practical analysis of AI tools and techniques as they apply to content and software.

     Story Needle RSS

    A massive compendium of articles by content strategist Michael Andrews, author of numerous books such as No More Silos and Metadata Basics for Web Content.

     Tech Docs

    David Garcia’s blog about documentation systems and “what breaks them” – discussing the tooling, infrastructure, and content strategy behind successful docs-as-code implementations.

     Technical Writing Uncensored RSS

    Hosted by Diana Payton, this interview-driven video podcast highlights some of the best minds in technical content. Episodes offer candid takes on documentation culture, skills needed for success, and unfiltered advice for tech writers.

     Technically Writing

    Occasional posts by a Spain-baed tech writer named Ian.

     technicalwriting.dev

    Individual blog of a tech writer focusing on developer documentation and tooling, specializing in Sphinx-based docs and static site generators for code projects. Includes explorations of AI tools in documentation.

     TechWhirl RSS

    Online resource for anyone interested in content management and technical communication; publishes interviews, analysis, and commentary on creating and managing information assets.

     The Not-Boring Tech Writer

    A KnowledgeOwl-sponsored podcast (hosted by Kate Mueller) that explores the craft of technical writing in an engaging way. Episodes feature interviews with tech writers and documentarians, touching on topics like breaking into the field, knowledge base and community management, documentation best practices, and personal career stories.

     This is important Atom

    Blog by Sarah Moir exploring technical writing, documentation, data analysis, ethics in tech and inclusivity. Includes both a general feed and a category-specific feed for tech-writing posts.

     Write the Docs Newsletter Atom

    Newsletter and blog from the Write the Docs community covering technical communication best practices, documentation culture, upcoming community events, and industry news.

    DocOps Lab

    Powering documentation operations with automation, tooling, and best practices
